name: variables-and-metadata
description: Demonstrates orchestration-level variables, environment variables, and built-in metadata template expressions. Variables let you define reusable values (with recursive expansion) that any step can reference via {{vars.name}}. Environment variables are accessed via {{env.VAR_NAME}}. Steps can also access orchestration metadata ({{orchestration.name}}, {{orchestration.runId}}, etc.) and their own step metadata ({{step.name}}, {{step.type}}).

steps.name: generate-report
steps.systemPrompt: You are a project reporting assistant. Generate clear, actionable reports from raw API data. Include the run metadata for traceability.
